name: Strengthened Shard Guide
desc: Increase the maximum number of fragments in the ship fragment group by %s.
short: Increased the size of debris swarms around ships.

name: Threat module link
desc: Reflects some connections between mother and daughter.

name: Threat Minefield
desc: A large number of induction air mines will be deployed around the battlefield to destroy approaching enemy ships.
short: A large number of induction air mines will be deployed around the battlefield to destroy approaching enemy ships.

name: Threat copy gantry
desc: Each LPC deploys an additional carrier-based aircraft. After the deployment is completed, the replenishment time is greatly reduced and the replenishment rate is increased.
sModDesc: The Combat Readiness (CR) (CR) (CR) value is reduced by %s, and the maintenance fee is increased by %s.

name: Threat remediation
desc: Use the fragments generated by the fragment generator to fill armor and structures
sModDesc: Additional increase in %s's structural repair and %s's armor repair

name: Dominate the core
desc: When deployed in battle, increases the %s range bonus of all friendly ships and increases the %s electronic warfare strength of the ship itself.

name: Refactoring the reactor
desc: Reduce {%s} beam damage, increase {%s} radiation energy discharge rate, reduce {%s} EMP damage, reduce {%s} overload time

name: Large dragon scale armor
desc: Increases Effective Armor Strength for damage reduction calculations by %s of its actual value. Improves the damage reduction effect of armor and increases the armor value by an additional 25%, but reduces the turret turning speed by 25%

name: dark matter reactor
desc: Increase %s radiation capacity, increase %s radiation. And increase the rate of %s forced layout and reduce %s emp damage

name: warp trap
desc: When deployed in battle, reduce the speed of enemy ships by %s within 2500 yards of the ship

name: Dark matter deflector shield
desc: Reduces the damage taken by %s's shield, allowing the ship to dissipate hard energy at %s's normal dissipation rate when the shield is open, while also reducing the amount of radiation required to maintain %s's shield.
short: Allows the ship to dissipate hard energy when deploying its shields.

name: "Prophecy" hull frame
desc: The "Prophecy" framework can customize weapons according to battlefield content and provide rich and diverse response strategies.
